description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a retro-inspired design, featuring a smooth, rounded chassis in a yellow and white color scheme. The main body houses a large metallic mixing bowl, which is securely attached beneath a broad, horizontal head. A single analog control dial is visible on the side, likely for adjusting speed or power, and a small button or indicator is positioned above it. The mixer’s bowl is metallic gray, contrasting with the yellow and white plastic of the chassis, and the mixing attachment is visible inside the bowl. The overall form is compact and sturdy, with a wide base for stability. The design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for use in kitchens, bakeries, or community spaces.
description: A retro-style yellow and white countertop mixer with a large metallic mixing bowl and a side control dial. The design is compact, sturdy, and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow and white chassis, metallic bowl, and a prominent control dial on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the mixer’s rounded back and the bowl’s attachment to the chassis, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bowl and chassis, but without the control dial visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open mouth of the metallic bowl and the central mixing attachment, with the head and base symmetrically aligned.
attribute_control_panel_type: analog dial with a single button or indicator
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with rounded edges and a wide, stable base
